seoTitle: How to Link Spotify to Your Instagram Notes in 2026
metaDescription: Want your currently playing song to show in your Instagram Note? Here's the quick way to link Spotify to Instagram and fix the connection if it glitches.
intro: Instagram Notes can display whatever song you're currently playing on Spotify, but the feature only works once the two accounts are linked. This guide walks through connecting Spotify to your Instagram Note step by step, including what to do if the link attempt crashes or glitches the first time. It also covers a few other places that Spotify connection unlocks, like Stories and Reels.

steps.heading: Open Instagram and go to your Notes
steps.body: From the Instagram home screen, swipe over to your Messages section, where the Note option sits at the top of the screen.

steps.heading: Tap the Music icon in the Note pop-up
steps.body: Tapping Note brings up a pop-up with several options — select the Music icon to bring up music-related settings, including the Spotify link.

steps.heading: Tap Link Spotify and open the Spotify app
steps.body: Choose 'Link Spotify' from the panel, then tap 'Open' when prompted to be taken into the Spotify app to complete the connection.

steps.heading: Retry if it crashes or glitches
steps.body: If the link attempt fails or the app crashes, simply return to Instagram and tap 'Link Spotify' again — this is a common hiccup that usually resolves on a second try.

steps.heading: Approve permissions in Spotify
steps.body: Once Spotify opens successfully, tap 'Agree' to let Instagram view your account data and listening activity, which allows your currently playing track to show in your Note.

faq.question: Why won't Spotify link to my Instagram Notes?
faq.answer: The connection can crash or glitch on the first attempt — if that happens, just go back and tap 'Link Spotify' again, which usually completes the connection on the second try.

faq.question: Does linking Spotify let Instagram see my listening activity?
faq.answer: Yes — once you tap 'Agree' on the permissions prompt, Instagram can access your Spotify listening activity so it can display your currently playing song in your Note.

faq.question: Can I use linked Spotify music in Stories and Reels too?
faq.answer: Yes, once your Spotify account is linked, you can add music to your bio, Stories, Reels, regular posts, and account highlights, not just your Note.

faq.question: Do I need Spotify Premium to link it to Instagram Notes?
faq.answer: The video doesn't specify a subscription requirement, so this isn't something to assume — check your own Spotify account status if the link option doesn't appear.
